docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF R. BOYD MCSPARRAN RE: LOST ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, CHRISTINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, CHRISTINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCALETTI, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 174 DOWNEY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
